Localization.Description: A network request made by executable files is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The suspicious file {object.process.name} made a network request to host {dst.ip}:{dst.port} on host {event_src.host}
The system file {object.process.name} made a network request to host {dst.ip}:{dst.port} on host {event_src.host}
The file {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host} made a network request from the suspicious port {src.port} to host {dst.ip}:{dst.port}
The new file {object.process.name} made a network request to host {dst.ip}:{dst.port} on host {event_src.host}
The file {object.process.name} on host {event_src.host} made a network request to the suspicious port of host {dst.ip}:{dst.port}
The file {object.process.name} from the temporary directory made a network request to host {dst.ip}:{dst.port} on host {event_src.host}
